tasks.label: MCP: Validate launchers
args: $env:PROJECT_ROOT='${workspaceFolder}'; if (-not $env:GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN) { $env:GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN='dummy_local_token' }; Get-ChildItem '${workspaceFolder}\tooling\mcp\start-*.ps1' | Sort-Object Name | ForEach-Object { & powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $_.FullName -ValidateOnly }
